result:
### Upgrade to v0.19 from earlier versions | SigNoz
Prior to upgrading to v0.19, you need to run the migration script. In case you upgrade and don't run the migration script, you might run into query-service pod crash loop. To solve this, follow the instructions in the section below.
Source: https://signoz.io/docs/operate/migration/upgrade-0.19

### Crash 2162-0002 on wifi connect in downgraded emummc created...
If the emummc is upgraded back to 19.0.1 with daybreak, the problem goes away. The problem does NOT occur with an emummc created from an older ofw version which has been upgraded to 19.0.1 with daybreak and then downgraded again (!)
Source: https://github.com/Atmosphere-NX/Atmosphere/issues/2463

19.0.0 ODIS Engineering for VAG diagnostics, DoIP vehicle selection, coding, flashing, and logs. ODIS Engineering is an offboard diagnostic platform used in Volkswagen Group engineering and test environments.

### Как решить: Почтальон выехал из пункта в 16.00 (см)?
Было в распоряжении 19-16 = 3 часа, 1/3 пути с учётом равномерности движения пройдена за 3 * 1/3 = 3/3 = 1 час, осталось 3-1 = 2 часа — время уменьшилось в 3/2 раза. Учитывая оба соображения, получаем, что скорость необходимо увеличить в.
Source: https://www.bolshoyvopros.ru/questions/4692945-kak-reshit-pochtalon-vyehal-iz-punkta-v-1600-sm.html
